indications_and_usage: Uses Anti-acne Tighten skin Moisturize Improve fine lines Whitening
dosage_and_administration: Directions Apply thin layer on acne-prone/oily areas after cleansing. Use 1–2 times daily, preferably at night; sunscreen during day. Start every other day; increase frequency if tolerated. Reduce use or add moisturizer if dryness/peeling occurs.
